Product Details
VS Water Seals

Auxiliary shaft sealing elements designed for splash resistance and contaminant exclusion in rotary equipment.

← Back to Product Center

Industrial Product

VS Water Seals

A useful auxiliary sealing option where rotary shafts need additional protection from water, dust, and environmental splash.

VS Water Seals rely on a flexible axial-contact rubber lip to support contaminant exclusion and help improve the service protection of the main sealing position.

Rotary Protection

Suitable for shaft systems that benefit from extra protection against splash, dust, and surface contaminants.

Auxiliary Sealing Role

Works alongside primary shaft seals to improve environmental shielding and overall operating cleanliness.

Simple Serviceability

The rubber structure supports practical assembly and replacement in equipment maintenance scenarios.

Product Specification
